notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for saudi_arabia. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for Saudi Arabia
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to Saudi Arabia, VIZA AI should consider the Saudi tourist eVisa or visa-on-arrival route when the nationality is eligible. First confirm nationality, passport validity, purpose, stay length, Umrah plans, entry count, minors, and whether the trip involves Hajj, work or residence. Hajj, work, study and residence need separate official routes. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: Saudi tourist eVisa eligible route
chunks.content: Saudi official tourist eVisa materials state that tourists from eligible countries can apply online before travel or obtain tourist visa services on arrival through Saudi immigration visa offices, subject to current rules. The official Saudi MOFA page lists China, including Hong Kong and Macau, among eligible Asian countries and states that the passport must be valid for at least six months from entry.

chunks.title: Saudi tourist visa scope and limits
chunks.content: Saudi tourist eVisa guidance is for tourism and related short visits; it is not a work, study, residence or Hajj visa. If the user mentions Hajj, employment, long-term residence, journalism, study or regulated activity, VIZA AI should route away from the tourist eVisa and ask clarifying questions. For Umrah, explain that rules can differ by season and official Nusuk/Saudi channels should be checked.

documents.title: Saudi Arabia Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Saudi Arabia application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Saudi tourist eVisa portal Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://ksavisa.sa/ ; https://embassies.mofa.gov.sa/sites/uk/EN/DiplomaticMissionServices/Consulates/ConsulatesServices/Other%20Visas%20Services%20e/Pages/UK-Travel-Agents-for-Visa-Services14.aspx. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Saudi Arabia fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality, contact details, travel dates, entry count, purpose, accommodation and Umrah-related answers where relevant

chunks.title: Saudi Arabia supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport with required validity, photo, insurance/payment data and any eligibility evidence requested by the official portal Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

Passport and identity fields:
- Crawler reached official or authorized source URLs, but did not extract a concise field-specific sentence. Keep this country's field answers constrained to official forms, passport data, and source URLs already listed in the country RAG seed.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
